rationale.fidelity: Cleanly separates advance reservations from demand-observing recourse and retains both recourse capacity and flow balance.
rationale.managerial_framing: Identifies the planner, two-stage trigger, cost stakes, hedging-versus-correction trade-off, and an appropriate policy comparison.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Not requested or claimed; the response stays at the bounded research-problem level.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Treats scenario probabilities as an assumption requiring calibration, though other parameter assumptions are only implicit.
rationale.overall: A strong, faithful two-stage framing with only a minor evidence-detail omission.
